linkedin.last_post_summary: Pichai announced his upcoming commencement address at Stanford University, emphasizing his return to his alma mater to speak to the Class of 2026.

data.recent_activity_summary: Pichai is heavily focused on the rapid expansion and adoption of Google's AI portfolio, including the launch of Gemma 4 and updates to Gemini Live and Chrome features. He is simultaneously engaging in public thought leadership through podcast appearances and academic speaking engagements.
